data.name: Upgrade My Heart
data.detailed_description:
视觉小说 • 科幻惊悚 • 爱情 • 成人 • 选择至关重要

马修的大学生活因他的秘密——一个名叫萨莎的人工智能机器人——引起了政府的关注而发生了翻天覆地的变化。在帮助一位朋友避免被驱逐出境后，她那性情古怪的妹妹卡米拉搬了进来，引发了混乱和欲望。

随着一名秘密特工渗透到他的圈子里，马修不得不在诱惑、秘密和生存之间挣扎。手机被黑客入侵，身份暴露，该团伙被迫躲藏起来——计划对被盗技术进行逆向工程，彻底结束这场追捕。

你的选择决定一切：

🔥 特色

  • 🎭 具有多个结局的分支叙事：坏，好......还是非常好？

  • 🤖 科幻间谍与成人浪漫的独特融合

  • 💬 对话密集的游戏玩法，具有道德灰色选择和动态角色路径

  • 🌍 探索身份、监视和反叛的主题——所有这些都带有诱人的转折

  • 💞 高重玩价值：不同的路径引领截然不同的结果

  • 🎧 原声音乐

    开发者备注：您无需玩《重启我的心》也能理解《升级我的心》，但我们推荐您玩一下。请查看包含两款游戏的捆绑包！

data.short_description: 马修用偷来的技术打造了一个人工智能机器人。随着政府的步步紧逼，信任、爱与生存在这部充满选择的科幻视觉小说中交织碰撞。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7-8-10-11
  • 處理器: 2.33GHz or faster x86-compatible processor, or Intel Atom™ 1.6GHz or faster processor for netbook class devices
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 and/or OpenGL 3.3 compatible video card
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間

data.name: Upgrade My Heart
data.detailed_description:
Visual Novel • Sci-Fi Thriller • Romance • Adult • Choices Matter

Mathew's college life takes a wild turn when his secret—an AI-powered robot named Sasha—draws government attention. After helping a friend avoid deportation, her provocative sister Camilla moves in, sparking chaos and desire.

As a covert agent infiltrates his circle, Mathew juggles seduction, secrets, and survival. Phones are hacked, identities exposed, and the group is forced into hiding—planning to reverse-engineer the stolen tech and end the chase for good.

Your choices shape everything:

🔥 FEATURES

  • 🎭 A branching narrative with multiple endings: Bad, Good... or Very Good?

  • 🤖 A unique fusion of sci-fi espionage and adult romance

  • 💬 Dialogue-heavy gameplay with morally grey choices and dynamic character paths

  • 🌍 Explore themes of identity, surveillance, and rebellion—all with a seductive twist

  • 💞 High replay value: different paths lead to radically different outcomes

  • 🎧 Original soundtrack

    NB from Developer: You don't need to play Reboot my Heart to understand Upgrade my Heart but we recommend it. Check the bundle with both games!

data.short_description: Mathew builds an AI robot with stolen tech. As the government closes in, trust, love, and survival collide in this sci-fi visual novel full of choices.
data.supported_languages:
English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7-8-10-11
  • Processor: 2.33GHz or faster x86-compatible processor, or Intel Atom™ 1.6GHz or faster processor for netbook class devices
  • Memory: 512 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 11 and/or OpenGL 3.3 compatible video card
  • Storage: 512 MB available space
